name: engagement_party_10

input.subject: Join Us! Rachel & David's Engagement Celebration
input.snippet: We're engaged! Come celebrate with us...
input.body_text:
✨ We're Engaged! ✨

Rachel & David

invite you to celebrate their engagement!

Saturday, April 4th, 2026
Four o'clock in the afternoon

Stonegate Winery
7801 Silverado Trail
Napa, CA 94558

Join us for wine tasting, hors d'oeuvres,
and sunset views in the vineyard.

Please RSVP to susan.miller@gmail.com
by March 25th

We can't wait to celebrate with you!

— Rachel & David

events.title: Rachel & David's Engagement Party
events.location: Stonegate Winery, 7801 Silverado Trail, Napa, CA 94558
events.description: Engagement celebration with wine tasting and hors d'oeuvres at winery

notes: Engagement party with 'Four o'clock in the afternoon' written-out time format
